home.metaTitle: Camper rentals in Barcelona · Otti Bull
home.metaDescription: Premium camper rentals in Barcelona. Fully equipped vehicles, comprehensive insurance and personalized service. Book online.
home.heroSubtitle: Premium camper rentals in Barcelona and Catalonia
home.featuredSubtitle: Discover all our fully equipped vehicles, ready for your next adventure
home.whySubtitle: Why hundreds of travellers choose Otti Bull to rent their camper in Barcelona

why.title: Comprehensive Insurance
why.body: Travel with total peace of mind. All our vehicles include comprehensive insurance with full coverage and roadside assistance.

why.title: 24/7 Support
why.body: We are available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Technical support and immediate assistance wherever you are.

why.title: Fully Equipped
why.body: Our campers come fully equipped: bedding, kitchenware, cleaning kit and everything you need for your trip.

why.title: Flexible Pickup
why.body: Pickup and drop-off times tailored to your needs. Door-to-door delivery available in the Barcelona area.

home.howItWorksTitle: Three steps and you are on the road
home.howItWorksSubtitle: No hidden steps, no surprises. Booking your camper is simple and fast.

howItWorksSteps.title: Choose your vehicle
howItWorksSteps.body: Browse our fleet and find the one that best fits your plans.

howItWorksSteps.title: Send your request
howItWorksSteps.body: Fill in the form with your dates and details. We reply by email and WhatsApp.

howItWorksSteps.title: Hit the road!
howItWorksSteps.body: Pick up the vehicle, we walk you through everything you need, and your adventure begins.

home.packSalidaSubtitle: Everything included in the departure pack:

packSalidaItems.title: Free Parking
packSalidaItems.body: Leave your car at our premises if you need to — very handy.

packSalidaItems.title: Kitchenware & Tableware
packSalidaItems.body: Everything you need to cook and eat (coffee maker, pots, pans, plates, glasses…).

packSalidaItems.title: Consumables
packSalidaItems.body: Butane gas cylinders and chemical tablets.

packSalidaItems.title: Flexible Hours
packSalidaItems.body: Option to pick up the night before departure and flexible arrival time.

home.packSalidaFooter: Mandatory — charged per trip, not per day.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Our customers' trust is our best endorsement

testimonials.name: María González
testimonials.quote: An incredible experience. The camper was spotless and the service was exceptional. We drove the whole Costa Brava and it was an unforgettable trip. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Ana Torres
testimonials.quote: The best decision for our holidays. Total flexibility on schedules, a vehicle in perfect condition and a warm, professional service. We are already planning our next trip with them.

home.finalCtaSubtitle: Get in touch and book your favourite camper

about.metaTitle: Otti Bull SL · Camper rentals in Barcelona
about.metaDescription: Otti Bull SL: specialists in premium camper rentals in Barcelona. Owned fleet, personalized service and local know-how.
story: At Otti Bull Caravaning, we are passionate about the freedom to travel and discover new horizons. From our base in Barcelona, we offer a premium camper rental service designed to make your adventure an unforgettable experience.

Our commitment is to provide you with vehicles in perfect condition, fully equipped and backed by the best customer service. Every camper in our fleet is carefully maintained and prepared to guarantee your safety and comfort on every kilometre.

Whether you are planning a weekend escape along the Catalan coast, a route through the Pyrenees, or a long European trip, at Otti Bull you will find the perfect vehicle and the support you need to live your adventure with complete peace of mind.

usefulLinks.metaDescription: Resources and reference websites to plan your camper adventure.
usefulLinks.title: Useful Links
usefulLinks.subtitle: Resources and reference websites to better plan your camper adventure

links.name: Tourism of Spain
links.description: A website offering detailed tourist information on different regions, cities and towns across Spain. It provides travel guides, recommendations for accommodation, food and activities, as well as news and articles on Spanish culture and history.

links.name: Park4Night
links.description: Mobile app and web platform with detailed information on places to camp, park and spend the night in a campervan or motorhome in different countries around the world.

links.name: Campings Online
links.description: Online platform offering information on campsites in several countries, including Spain, France, Portugal, Italy and Germany. You can search by location, services and activities, and book your stay online.
